description_long: This is a robust, cylindrical barrel with a slightly bulging midsection and flat top and bottom surfaces. The main body is constructed from dark, polished wood panels, each separated and reinforced by wide, vertical metal bands that are riveted at the top and bottom. One side of the barrel features engraved markings or symbols on a metal band, adding a distinctive detail. The metal bands have a matte, slightly weathered finish, suggesting durability and industrial use. The top surface is solid and flush with the sides, with no visible openings or handles. The overall appearance is utilitarian, suitable for storage or transport in urban or industrial environments.
description: A sturdy wooden barrel reinforced with wide, riveted metal bands and engraved markings on one side. The design is utilitarian and industrial, with a solid, flat top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the barrel's wooden panels and three prominent vertical metal bands with visible rivets.
description_view_1: This side view highlights engraved markings or symbols on one of the metal bands, distinguishing it from other sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side to the front, showing a similar arrangement of wooden panels and metal bands, but without any markings.
description_view_3: Another side view with metal bands and wood, no visible markings or unique features compared to other sides.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: engraved symbols on one metal band
